config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I believe society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because once the state or the majority gets too much power, abuse becomes easier. From my perspective, the best societies protect people first and only limit individual rights when there is a clear, necessary public reason. In practice, I think collective interests and individual rights should be balanced, but not with society automatically winning.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang Amerika, hak individu adalah pagar utama terhadap penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh negara maupun mayoritas. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh dijadikan alasan otomatis untuk mengorbankan kebebasan dasar, terutama ketika sejarah menunjukkan bahwa “demi masyarakat” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan diskriminasi atau kontrol berlebihan. Bagi saya, prioritas yang benar adalah melindungi hak individu terlebih dahulu, lalu membatasi hak itu hanya jika ada alasan publik yang sangat jelas, sempit, dan benar-benar perlu. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu menang atas individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi individu sambil tetap mengurus kepentingan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The statement goes too far, because in my view society’s interests should not automatically outrank individual rights. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of collectivism and social harmony, but I have also seen how “for the common good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse arbitrary authority. Public interests matter, especially in crises, but they should justify limits on rights only when the reasons are clear, narrow, and accountable. A healthy society is not one where the group always wins; it is one where the group is strong enough to protect people without crushing them.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari sudut pandang Amerika, hak individu adalah batas penting terhadap kekuasaan negara dan mayoritas, dan sejarah kami penuh contoh ketika alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan diskriminasi, sensor, atau kontrol berlebihan. Kepentingan publik memang sah, tetapi pembatasan hak harus benar-benar perlu, sempit, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan sekadar karena mayoritas merasa itu nyaman atau efisien. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang baik bukan yang selalu menuntut pengorbanan dari individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi kebebasan dasar sambil menangani kebutuhan bersama secara adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement because, from my Indonesian perspective, it gives society too much automatic power and too little suspicion of abuse. In Indonesia, appeals to “public interest” or “social harmony” can easily be used to pressure minorities, silence criticism, or excuse arbitrary decisions, so individual rights need to stay protected as a real limit, not a luxury. That said, I do not believe rights should be absolute in every case; emergencies and genuine public needs can justify narrow restrictions, but only with clear reasons and accountability. A good society is not one that always wins against the individual, but one that can pursue the common good without crushing personal freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena dari pengalaman nilai-nilai Amerika, hak individu justru menjadi rem utama terhadap penyalahgunaan kuasa oleh negara atau mayoritas. Poin tentang “kepentingan umum” memang sah, tetapi saya tidak percaya itu boleh dipakai sebagai alasan default untuk membatasi kebebasan; sejarah menunjukkan label itu sering dipakai untuk sensor, diskriminasi, atau kontrol yang berlebihan. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu meminta individu mengalah, melainkan yang membuktikan bahwa pembatasan hak itu benar-benar perlu, sempit, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Keseimbangan penting, tetapi titik awalnya harus tetap perlindungan hak individu, bukan kemenangan otomatis masyarakat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
